init

await Select a branch
snapshot
cmp stdout prompt

feed a
await
snapshot
cmp stdout filter

feed <Enter>

-- rows --
10
-- branches --
[
  {"branch": "echo"},
  {"branch": "alpha"},
  {"branch": "bravo"},
  {"branch": "charlie"},
  {"branch": "delta"},
  {"branch": "gamma"},
  {"branch": "hotel"},
  {"branch": "lambda"}
]
-- selected --
lambda
-- want --
lambda
-- prompt --
Select a branch:
▲▲▲
charlie
delta
gamma
hotel
lambda ◀
-- filter --
Select a branch:
▲▲▲
bravo
charlie
delta
gamma
lambda ◀
